description:
Rust idiom review of secretx-cache crate. Findings filed as child issues.

Scope: src/lib.rs (240 lines), tests/caching_store.rs (204 lines).

Pre-flight: cargo clippy --all-features -p secretx-cache -- -D warnings: clean. cargo hack check feature-powerset: clean. RUSTDOCFLAGS docsrs cargo +nightly doc: clean.

Style: small, well-documented crate with explicit thundering-herd note. Findings concentrate on Rust idiom (tokio Mutex vs std Mutex when not held across await), generic-vs-dyn ergonomics, Zeroizing roundtrip, and test duplication.
title: Review: secretx-cache rusty pass
